LanguageData.VBE_GeneModdedBeauty.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] is the product of one of the old world's most lavish cosmetic clinics. During [PAWN_possessive] life, [PAWN_pronoun] spent an untold fortune on [PAWN_possessive] looks and had little time to practice anything more practical.
LanguageData.VBE_ShipsNavigator.title: Convoy navigator
LanguageData.VBE_ShipsNavigator.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] charted routes for long-haul convoys moving through the wastes and across dangerous old-world corridors. [PAWN_pronoun] had an uncanny ability to find the safest and quickest paths, though [PAWN_pronoun] struggled with mechanical tasks and often left those to others.
LanguageData.VBE_EngineRoomTech.baseDesc: As a reactor room technician, [PAWN_nameDef] kept long-haul rigs and settlement generators running. [PAWN_pronoun] could fix almost anything with the right tools, but [PAWN_pronoun] lacked finesse in social interactions and avoided tasks that required a gentle touch.
LanguageData.VBE_GalacticMedic.title: Convoy medic
LanguageData.VBE_GalacticMedic.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] served as the medic for a long-haul convoy, treating everything from radiation sickness to crash injuries on broken highways. [PAWN_possessive] knowledge of medicine was unparalleled, but [PAWN_pronoun] had no head for research or complex theories.
LanguageData.VBE_CargoHandler.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was responsible for managing freight yards and convoy manifests, ensuring supplies were securely stowed and inventory was accurately tracked. [PAWN_pronoun] was physically strong and highly organized, but [PAWN_pronoun] had little patience for detailed documentation or scholarly pursuits.
LanguageData.VBE_GalleyChef.title: Convoy cook
LanguageData.VBE_GalleyChef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] kept a long-haul convoy fed, turning salvaged ingredients into hearty meals for the crew. Cooking on the move presented its own challenges, yet [PAWN_pronoun] mastered the art. However, [PAWN_pronoun] never took well to machinery, preferring pans over engines.
LanguageData.VBE_BloodlineFounder.title: Founder's heir
LanguageData.VBE_BloodlineFounder.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] had a fiercely contested origin, with no one willing to admit [PAWN_possessive] connection to a powerful founder's bloodline. Somehow, [PAWN_pronoun] still carried the legacy of an old regime, and when those rights came to light, suddenly everyone wanted a piece of what remained.
LanguageData.VBE_DeposedRoyalty.title: Deposed warlord
LanguageData.VBE_DeposedRoyalty.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] carved out a region-spanning domain through brutal conflict, refusing to surrender [PAWN_possessive] people's right to live without oppression. Eventually, rival factions joined forces to break [PAWN_possessive] rule, and [PAWN_possessive] bodyguards forced [PAWN_objective] to flee. While [PAWN_pronoun] did everything possible to secure a future for [PAWN_possessive] people, failing to protect them remains [PAWN_possessive] greatest shame.
